steps.title: Apply the red-color research
steps.content: The passage connects Northbridge United's red home uniforms with research showing that people associate red with power and dominance and may respond to it with caution or hesitation. If those findings apply in athletic competitions, the effect would fall on opponents facing the red uniforms.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported details
steps.content: The blank should name an influence from Northbridge United's uniform color, not an effect from fans or a claim about conscious awareness. A contradicts the idea of an effect, B invents a comparison involving opponents' own uniforms, and D adds awareness that the passage never establishes. The answer is C.
